evidence_summary: Approved: the four scoped files remove hscOptionHash/componentOptionHash/getOptionHash plumbing, GetModSummary now calls getModSummaryFromImports session fp, HscEnvEq matches origin/codex/hls-graph-runtime-engine, git diff --check passed, the exact hash-symbol rg check returned no matches, and ghcup run --ghc 9.12.2 -- cabal build passed.
